name: Apple Brandy Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle brandy over apples, and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, cinnamon, soda, nutmeg, salt, and cloves. Stir in walnuts and raisins.
3. In another bowl, mix sugar, oil, and eggs until well combined. Blend this mixture into the dry ingredients.
4. Add the apples to the batter and stir until just mixed.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch pan.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 1 hour.
7. Remove from the pan and let cool on a wire rack.
8. Sift powdered sugar over the top before serving.
